items.title: Freezing 5.6 million dormant bitcoin could trigger ‘worst’ single-day repricing
items.desc: Maximalists warn freezing 5.6M BTC risks instant sell-offs, while others say quantum threats leave no alternative.

items.title: ‘The best days of crypto are ahead’: Bernstein sees asymmetric upside and structurally longer bull cycle
items.desc: New institutional on-ramps, strong flows, and exhausted retail selling points to renewed asymmetric upside for bitcoin, Bernstein said.

items.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Makes Biggest Ethereum Buy So Far in 2026, Hitting 5 Million ETH Milestone
items.desc: BitMine Immersion Technologies now holds over 5 million ETH, following the leading Ethereum treasury firm's biggest buy since December.

items.title: Strive Expands Bitcoin Treasury With $61.4 Million Purchase, Holdings Reach 14,557 BTC
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Strive Expands Bitcoin Treasury With $61.4 Million Purchase, Holdings Reach 14,557 BTC Strive boosted its Bitcoin treasury with a fresh purchase of 789 BTC, valued at roughly $61.43 million. This post Strive Expands Bitcoin Treasury With $61.4 Million Purchase, Holdings Reach 14,557 BTC first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy adds 3.2K Bitcoin at nearly $78K per BTC
items.desc: Michael Saylor’s Strategy bought 3,273 Bitcoin for $255 million between April 20 and 26, bringing total holdings to 818,334 BTC.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.desc: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Ethereum’s EEZ could pull other blockchains into its orbit
items.desc: The Ethereum Economic Zone aims to unify fragmented rollups, but its broader goal is to extend interoperability to other blockchains, says Ernst.

items.title: MiCA has made euro stablecoins safe but weak, new report argues
items.desc: A new Blockchain for Europe report says MiCA has made euro stablecoins safer but less competitive, and urges targeted reforms to reserves and remuneration.

items.title: CFTC Chairman Endorses Prediction Markets as Valuable for Hedging and Information Discovery: Selig
items.desc: CFTC Chairman Rostin Behnam said prediction markets provide measurable value to participants and the public, committing the agency to setting regulatory standards for the sector.

items.title: Signal in the age of infinite noise
items.desc: The anonymous person behind the popular X account, SightBringer, explains his take on the most valuable and least understood asset of the market.

items.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys 3,273 bitcoin as it inches closer to its 1 million target
items.desc: Strategy, the largest corporate holder of bitcoin in the world, now holds 818,334 BTC, which it said it purchased for nearly $62 billion at an average price of roughly $75,537 per token.

items.title: Strive acquires 789 BTC, bumping ninth-largest corporate bitcoin treasury over 14,000 BTC
items.desc: Strive also recently tightened its preferred stock's trading range while boosting its monthly dividend yield to 12.75%.

items.title: BitMine’s ether holdings top 5.078 million after largest purchase since December
items.desc: BitMine said its ether holdings climbed to 5.078 million tokens after another 101,901 ETH purchase last week.

items.title: Maple Finance Surpasses $7B in Total Bridge Volume: Maple
items.desc: Maple Finance announced it has crossed $7 billion in total bridge volume, signaling growing cross-chain demand for yield-bearing dollar assets.

items.title: Bitmine buys $236 million in ether as Tom Lee touts ETH as 'wartime store of value'
items.desc: The firm has bought more than 5 million in ETH in just 10 months while most digital asset treasury companies have stopped accumulating.

items.title: Money Launderer Sentenced to 70 Months Over $263M Crypto Social-Engineering Scheme
items.desc: California money launderer Evan Tangeman admitted to having processed millions in stolen cryptocurrency proceeds.

items.title: Satori Coin Enters U.S. Market With Physical Bitcoin Collectibles
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Satori Coin Enters U.S. Market With Physical Bitcoin Collectibles Satori Coin is launching in the U.S. with physical Bitcoin collectibles that embed private keys in tamper-evident coins. This post Satori Coin Enters U.S. Market With Physical Bitcoin Collectibles first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: TD Cowen reiterates buy rating on Smarter Web Company, says it remains UK’s only scaled bitcoin treasury vehicle
items.desc: TD Cowen said The Smarter Web Company has strengthened its position as the only UK-listed bitcoin treasury vehicle at scale.

items.title: MicroStrategy Purchases 3,273 Bitcoin for ~$255 Million; Polymarket Odds Show 10% Chance of Sale This Year
items.desc: MicroStrategy has acquired an additional 3,273 Bitcoin in a new purchase valued at approximately $255 million, while prediction market Polymarket sets 10% odds on the company selling any Bitcoin before year-end.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs Extend Longest Win Streak Since September, But Spot Demand Lags
items.desc: The nine-day inflow streak saw spot Bitcoin ETFs draw in $2.1 billion, but experts warn of “net negative” on-chain demand.

items.title: The Block appoints veteran media operator Steve Chung as CEO
items.desc: Chung takes over from Larry Cermak, who remains President of The Block, overseeing research, data, and product.

items.title: First 21-week trend line reclaim since October 2025: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
items.desc: Bitcoin price action sealed its first weekly candle close above a 21-week moving average trend line since it traded near $115,000 in October 2025.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins rally coincides with token unlock as analyst flags exit liquidity risk
items.desc: DNTV Research's Bradley Park says bullish ecosystem news gave large holders the liquidity they needed to sell into a recent PENGU unlock.

items.title: Bitcoin funds take in $933 million as crypto ETFs hit highest AUM since February
items.desc: Total assets under management across crypto funds rose to $155 billion, the highest level since February 1, though still well below the $263 billion peak from October 2025.

items.title: ‘The beat goes on’: Michael Saylor’s Strategy adds 3,273 bitcoin for $255 million as holdings reach 818,334 BTC
items.desc: Strategy's holdings account for 3.9% of the total 21 million bitcoin supply — worth around $63.7 billion.

items.title: Morning Minute: NFTs Storm Back, Led by Bored Apes
items.desc: Bitcoin made its highest weekly close since January. Western Union is launching a stablecoin. And NFTs are making a major comeback.

items.title: Kbank teams with Ripple on overseas blockchain remittance trial
items.desc: Kbank partnered with Ripple to test blockchain-based overseas remittances as South Korean companies prepare for new stablecoin and digital asset rules.

items.title: From SWIFT to onchain: South Korea’s biggest digital bank taps Ripple for high-speed global transfers
items.desc: KBank is using Palisade, Ripple's software-as-a-service wallet that was acquired earlier this year as part of Ripple's $4 billion in crypto-related investments.

items.title: France Charges 88, Including Minors, in Crypto ‘Wrench Attack’ Crackdown
items.desc: France has recorded 135 crypto-linked incidents since 2023, amid a nationwide surge in so-called “wrench attacks."

items.title: MiCA-licensed Banking Circle joins bank stablecoin settlement race in Europe
items.desc: Banking Circle's stablecoin settlement launch follows its CASP approval, entering a crowded market with SocGen, Sygnum and a 12-bank euro stablecoin consortium.

items.title: Bitcoin hits wall at $80,000, one analyst says the pullback is temporary
items.desc: What you need to know for April 27, 2026

items.title: ‘Better than bailouts?’: Curve founder proposes market-based bad debt recovery model for DeFi lending amid KelpDAO fallout
items.desc: Curve founder Michael Egorov proposed a new way to recover bad debt in DeFi lending markets amid industry debates on the KelpDAO incident.

items.title: Bitcoin leads $1.2B weekly inflows into crypto investment products
items.desc: Crypto ETPs see $1.2 billion inflows in fourth straight week as Bitcoin leads gains and blockchain equity ETFs hit record demand, CoinShares reported.

items.title: EU’s largest measures against Russia yet include escalation of crypto sanctions evasion
items.desc: The European Union noted that Russia has become increasingly reliant on cryptocurrency to circumvent sanctions.

items.title: Western Union to Launch USDPT Stablecoin in May: Western Union
items.desc: Western Union plans to roll out its USDPT stablecoin next month, alongside a digital wallet network and Stable Card for global payments.

items.title: Western Union to Launch Solana-Based Stablecoin Plus ‘Stable Card’ Next Month
items.desc: The USDPT stablecoin launching next month will serve as an alternative to SWIFT for agent settlements rather than consumer transactions.

items.title: French prosecutors charge 88 individuals linked to crypto wrench attacks
items.desc: French authorities urged crypto holders to remain vigilant and avoid extensive exposure on social media that could make them targets.

items.title: Bitcoin leads $1.2B weekly haul for global crypto funds as institutional demand builds: CoinShares
items.desc: Improving institutional demand spurred by bitcoin's multi-week high pushed $1.2 billion in weekly flows to crypto funds.

items.title: Luxor, MicroBT deepen ties with $100 million mining rig deal and planned investment
items.desc: Luxor said it is committing $100 million to purchase MicroBT WhatsMiner rigs, while MicroBT has signed a term sheet to invest in Luxor.

items.title: Global interest rates, Robinhood, Galaxy earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
items.desc: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 27.

items.title: 88 people charged over 12 crypto wrench attacks in France
items.desc: French law enforcement agencies have been investigating wrench attacks and found that some of the alleged offenders were involved in multiple incidents

items.title: Prediction markets reflect 'wisdom of an informed minority,’ not crowd: Study
items.desc: About 3.5% of informed traders, including market makers and skilled takers, capture over 30% of profits on prediction platforms, while about 67% of users absorb the entirety of losses.

items.title: Upbit partner KBank to test onchain cross-border remittances with Ripple
items.desc: KBank and Ripple have already completed the first phase of the PoC, in which they verified a wallet app-based remittance system.

items.title: A long-time developer wants to split Bitcoin blockchain and reassign Satoshi coins. The community is calling it a theft
items.desc: Paul Sztorc proposes a 2026 hard fork of Bitcoin called eCash, giving BTC holders equivalent tokens and adding Drivechains.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins, BAYC rally masks a shrinking NFT market as volumes and users fall
items.desc: The two blue-chip collections are leading double-digit gains as global NFT sales volume falls and participation hits multi-year lows.

items.title: Bitcoin pulls back from 12-week high as Iran rally hits seller wall at $79,400
Western Union eyes May for its stablecoin USDPT rollout
items.desc: Western Union CEO Devin McGranahan said the company will focus on expanding adoption and embedding digital assets into its core money movement platform going forward.

items.title: Aave asks Arbitrum to send 30K ETH from Kelp exploiter to ‘DeFi United’
items.desc: More than $21 million in contributions has been made to the "DeFi United" relief effort so far, with another $215 million to be potentially allocated if certain governance proposals succeed.

items.title: Western Union to launch stablecoin next month, with ‘Stable Card’ planned for global consumers
items.desc: WU is also launching a network connecting digital wallets to its existing retail infrastructure, and a stablecoin card for payments.

items.title: Bitcoin climbs above $79,000, Asian equities rise amid ‘subdued’ geopolitical tensions
items.desc: The Crypto Fear & Greed Index rose to 47, returning to the 'Neutral' zone from around 12 in 'Extreme Fear' last month.

items.title: Skilled Polymarket traders are a 3% minority, and everyone else funds their gains: study
items.desc: A working paper analyzing every Polymarket trade between 2023 and 2025, finds that about 3% of accounts generate the bulk of price discovery.

items.title: 'Historical average' could push Bitcoin bottom at $57K level: Analyst
items.desc: Bitcoin was “rejected” from the $80,000 price level, which is its next resistance zone on the way to reclaiming the $100,000 psychological price level.

items.title: UTXO Management Launches Dual-Class Digital Credit Income Fund
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine UTXO Management Launches Dual-Class Digital Credit Income Fund UTXO Management has launched a dual-class digital credit income fund that offers a senior income tranche targeting fixed monthly yields and a total return tranche focused on leveraged upside. This post UTXO Management Launches Dual-Class Digital Credit Income Fund first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: 22-year-old sentenced to 70 months for money laundering tied to $263 million crypto syndicate
items.desc: The Lamborghini-laden money laundering operation was "built on greed so brazen it borders on the cartoonish," according to prosecutors.

items.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor again hints at impending BTC purchase
items.desc: The biggest Bitcoin treasury company's data shows holdings are profitable, having gained about 3.3% amid Bitcoin's rally to about $78,000.

items.title: Running out of time on Clarity: State of Crypto
items.desc: April is almost over. May is the month to watch.

items.title: Litecoin gives post-attack update, but other devs doubt zero-day theory
items.desc: Valid transactions that occurred during the affected blocks were not impacted and remain on the main chain, the Litecoin development team said.

items.title: Aave raises nearly 80% of the $200 million it needs to cover bad debt left by Kelp DAO exploit
items.desc: Blockchain analytics platform Arkham said that the largest contributors are Mantle and Aave DAO, having raised a combined $127 million.

items.title: Why DeFi isn't dead despite massive exploits and $13 billion investor exodus
items.desc: A $292 million exploit and $13 billion TVL drop looks catastrophic on the surface, but the data tells a different story.

items.title: Bitcoin whales build long positions as funding stays deeply negative
items.desc: Long bias from the largest perpetual traders on Hyperliquid has built steadily through February, March and April, with the position now leaning aggressively long as bitcoin tags $80,000 and US-Iran talks resume.

items.title: Market conditions force 1 in 3 crypto traders to cut everyday spending: Survey
items.desc: More than a third of US crypto traders report cutting daily expenses and delaying major purchases as unrealized losses weigh on household finances.

items.title: Only 3% of traders drive prediction markets' accuracy, not the crowd, study finds
items.desc: Researchers show market accuracy comes from a tiny group of informed traders, not broad participation.

items.title: MiCA's not enough: Bybit CEO says firms need other licenses to turn a profit in Europe
items.desc: In an interview, Ben Zhou said the crypto exchange is at least two years away from breaking even in Europe.

items.title: Coinbase's John D’Agostino says crypto platform stands alone as industry's full-service prime broker
items.desc: The exchange’s institutional arm has quietly assembled trading, custody, financing, derivatives and cross margining into a single stack, something its rivals still piece together.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation unstakes 17K ETH after nearing 70K staked ETH milestone
items.desc: The Ethereum Foundation unstaked over 17,000 ETH worth $40M shortly after approaching its 70,000 ETH staking target.

items.title: Litecoin hit by denial-of-service attack, rewrites 13 blocks to reverse effect
items.desc: Litecoin's foundation called the weekend exploit a zero-day. The litecoin-project GitHub repository shows the consensus vulnerability was privately patched between March 19 and 26, more than four weeks before the attack.

items.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
items.desc: The group spent tens of millions of dollars on luxury items and real estate, using funds stolen from crypto users in social engineering scams.

items.title: Litecoin rewrites three hours of history to undo its first major privacy-layer exploit
items.desc: Attackers used the more than three-hour fork window to attempt double-spends against cross-chain swap protocols.

items.title: Bitcoiners cast doubt on the US military's understanding of the network
items.desc: Bitcoin advocate Matthew Kratter said US Navy Admiral Samuel Paparo's Senate testimony on Tuesday sounded like it was written by an "intern."

items.title: Bitcoin Hit Its Highest Price Since January—Why VanEck Analysts See More Potential Gains
items.desc: Bitcoin hash rate recovery and negative funding rates signal potential gains ahead, according to the ETF provider's latest network analysis.

items.title: Aave, Kelp, LayerZero ask Arbitrum DAO to release $71 million in frozen ETH to rsETH recovery effort
items.desc: The standard Constitutional AIP lifecycle runs roughly 49 days from forum publication to onchain execution, a timeline some delegates say is too long.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.
